title: 7 Best Commodity Stocks to Buy on the Dip
text: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell was a bit of a party pooper last week when he told the world to expect “some pain” as the central bank attempts to tackle inflation. Stocks sold off sharply following his remarks at the annual economic symposium at Jackson Hole, Wyo.

title: 3 Wheat Stocks to Buy as the Shortage Continues
text: Wheat stocks to buy is our topic for today. The impacts of climate change and Russia's invasion of  Ukraine, a major wheat exporter, have caused major upheaval across commodity markets in 2022.

title: The 3 Best Commodity Stocks to Buy Now
text: Finding the best commodity stocks to buy can be challenging. Commodity investing involves directing capital toward the raw materials that are either consumed directly or serve as the building blocks of other products.

title: Revisiting Bunge: A Scale-Down Buying Approach Begins To Pay Dividends
text: BG reached a higher low in July - Scale-down buying allows for accumulation. Q2 earnings were disappointing - BG has been rallying since early July.

title: 5 Stocks Worth a Look Following Upgrade by Brokers
text: For significant returns, investors should keep broker-favored stocks like C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW), Covenant Logistics (CVLG), ArcBest (ARCB), American Airlines (AAL) and Bunge Limited (BG) on their radar.

title: The 3 Best Sectors for a Bear Market
text: This has not been a kind year for investors. In fact, the S&P 500 fell 21% in the first half of the year.

title: Reasons That Make Bunge Stock A Buy
text: The agriculture bull market has legs thanks to tight supply, high demand, and strong pricing. Bunge is in a good spot to benefit from this thanks to investments in its business, high crush margins, and a valuation that has come down.
